productDisplayName: ADIDAS Delhi Daredevils Unisex Navy Blue Match Cap
description: IPL caps are up for grabs! You know your team never shies away from a challenge and you too can embrace their never-say-die spirit when you wear this Delhi Daredevils match cap from adidas! Beat the heat in this cap as the cotton fabric and eyelets keep your head cool and dry all day. Team it with an adidas DD jersey to complete your sporty fashion statement during the IPL season. Made of 100% cotton Embroidered eyelets on the crown Embroidered brand name on the back, above the strap Delhi Daredevils branding on the crown Adidas patented 3-Stripes in white on the visor Adjustable back strap Cap care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not tumble dry, use softeners or bleach Line dry
